title: Umami-Egg-Heimat
description: A low-carb friendly, nostalgic German dish featuring tender eggs cooked with umami elements and a touch of nostalgia.
instructions: Whisk eggs with low-fat sour cream until combined.
Add finely minced garlic to the egg mixture.
Season gently with coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper.
In a small saucepan, warm up fresh herbs like chives or parsley for garnish, ensuring they do not wilt too much.
Pour the egg mixture into hot, pre-warmed dishes (avoiding boiling water).
Garnish each dish with warm chopped herbs before serving.
